_description: Token filter that stems English words by removing plural suffixes. It is less aggressive than other English stemmers and does not modify non-plural words.

type.markdownDescription: Label that identifies the `englishMinimalStemming` token filter type, which stems English words by removing plural suffixes.
type.description: Label that identifies the englishMinimalStemming token filter type, which stems English words by removing plural suffixes.
